quotes.0: Anywhere can be paradise as long as you have the will to live.
quotes.1: Man fears the darkness, and so he scrapes away at the edges of it with fire.
quotes.2: Pain is something man must endure in his heart
quotes.3: Humans can only truly understand each other through pain
quotes.4: The only person who can sympathize with you and understand you is you.
quotes.5: Reality is merely an illusion framed by your expectations.
quotes.6: People cannot live without hurting one another.
quotes.7: As long as you have the will to live, anywhere can be heaven.
quotes.8: Dreams are one reality. Reality is another
quotes.9: The fate of destruction is also the joy of rebirth.
quotes.10: Humans forget their foolishness and repeat their mistakes.
quotes.11: The fear of pain is greater than pain itself.
quotes.12: The closer you get to someone, the deeper the hurt can become.
quotes.13: Any new position from which you view your reality will change your perception of its nature
quotes.15: If you know pain and hardship, it is easier to be kind to others.
quotes.16: Mankind's greatest fear is mankind itself.
quotes.17: One who truly hates himself cannot love or trust others.
quotes.18: The instrumentality of mankind is the hope that people can become one.
